tables.name: _sqlx_migrations
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE _sqlx_migrations (
    version BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    installed_on TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    success BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    checksum BLOB NOT NULL,
    execution_time BIGINT NOT NULL
)

tables.name: peaks
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `peaks` (
    `height` INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `header_hash` BLOB NOT NULL
)

tables.name: derivations
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `derivations` (
    `p2_puzzle_hash` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `index` INTEGER NOT NULL,
    `hardened` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `synthetic_key` BLOB NOT NULL
)

tables.name: coin_states

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (transaction_id) REFERENCES transactions (transaction_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `coin_states` (
    `coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `parent_coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `puzzle_hash` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `amount` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `spent_height` INTEGER,
    `created_height` INTEGER,
    `hint` BLOB,
    `synced` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `transaction_id` BLOB, `kind` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `spent_unixtime` BIGINT, `created_unixtime` BIGINT,
    FOREIGN KEY (`transaction_id`) REFERENCES `transactions` (`transaction_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: transactions
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `transactions` (
    `transaction_id` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `aggregated_signature` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `fee` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `submitted_at` INTEGER
)

tables.name: transaction_spends

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (transaction_id) REFERENCES transactions (transaction_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `transaction_spends` (
    `coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `index` INTEGER NOT NULL,
    `transaction_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `parent_coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `puzzle_hash` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `amount` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `puzzle_reveal` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `solution` BLOB NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (`transaction_id`) REFERENCES `transactions` (`transaction_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: cats

indexes.name: cat_name
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX `cat_name` ON `cats` (`visible` DESC, `is_named` DESC, `name` ASC, `asset_id` ASC)

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `cats` (
    `asset_id` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `name` TEXT,
    `ticker` TEXT,
    `visible` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `icon` TEXT,
    `description` TEXT,
    `fetched` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `is_named` BOOLEAN GENERATED ALWAYS AS (`name` IS NOT NULL) STORED
)

tables.name: cat_coins

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (coin_id) REFERENCES coin_states (coin_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `cat_coins` (
    `coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `parent_parent_coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `parent_inner_puzzle_hash` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `parent_amount` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `p2_puzzle_hash` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `asset_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (`coin_id`) REFERENCES `coin_states` (`coin_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: dids

indexes.name: did_name
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX `did_name` ON `dids` (`is_owned`, `visible` DESC, `is_pending` DESC, `is_named` DESC, `name` ASC, `launcher_id` ASC)

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (coin_id) REFERENCES did_coins (coin_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `dids` (
    `launcher_id` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `name` TEXT,
    `visible` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `is_owned` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `is_named` BOOLEAN GENERATED ALWAYS AS (`name` IS NOT NULL) STORED,
    `created_height` INTEGER,
    `is_pending` BOOLEAN GENERATED ALWAYS AS (`created_height` IS NULL) STORED,
    FOREIGN KEY (`coin_id`) REFERENCES `did_coins` (`coin_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: future_did_names
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `future_did_names` (
    `launcher_id` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `name` TEXT NOT NULL
)

tables.name: did_coins

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (coin_id) REFERENCES coin_states (coin_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `did_coins` (
    `coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `parent_parent_coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `parent_inner_puzzle_hash` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `parent_amount` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `launcher_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `recovery_list_hash` BLOB,
    `num_verifications_required` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `metadata` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `p2_puzzle_hash` BLOB NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (`coin_id`) REFERENCES `coin_states` (`coin_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: collections

indexes.name: col_name
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX `col_name` ON `collections` (`visible` DESC, `is_named` DESC, `name` ASC, `collection_id` ASC)

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `collections` (
    `collection_id` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `did_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `metadata_collection_id` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `name` TEXT,
    `visible` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `icon` TEXT,
    `is_named` BOOLEAN GENERATED ALWAYS AS (`name` IS NOT NULL) STORED
)

tables.name: nfts

indexes.name: nft_owner_did_name
indexes.def:
CREATE INDEX `nft_owner_did_name` ON `nfts` (
    `is_owned`,
    `owner_did`,
    `visible` DESC,
    `is_pending` DESC,
    `is_named` DESC,
    `name` ASC,
    `edition_number` ASC,
    `launcher_id` ASC
)

indexes.name: nft_minter_did_name
indexes.def:
CREATE INDEX `nft_minter_did_name` ON `nfts` (
    `is_owned`,
    `minter_did`,
    `visible` DESC,
    `is_pending` DESC,
    `is_named` DESC,
    `name` ASC,
    `edition_number` ASC,
    `launcher_id` ASC
)

indexes.name: nft_col_name
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX `nft_col_name` ON `nfts` (`is_owned`, `collection_id`, `visible` DESC, `is_pending` DESC, `is_named` DESC, `name` ASC, `edition_number` ASC, `launcher_id` ASC)

indexes.name: nft_name
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX `nft_name` ON `nfts` (`is_owned`, `visible` DESC, `is_pending` DESC, `is_named` DESC, `name` ASC, `edition_number` ASC, `launcher_id` ASC)

indexes.name: nft_owner_did_recent
indexes.def:
CREATE INDEX `nft_owner_did_recent` ON `nfts` (
    `is_owned`, 
    `owner_did`,
    `visible` DESC,
    `is_pending` DESC,
    `created_height` DESC,
    `launcher_id` ASC
)

indexes.name: nft_minter_did_recent
indexes.def:
CREATE INDEX `nft_minter_did_recent` ON `nfts` (
    `is_owned`, 
    `minter_did`,
    `visible` DESC,
    `is_pending` DESC,
    `created_height` DESC,
    `launcher_id` ASC
)

indexes.name: nft_col_recent
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX `nft_col_recent` ON `nfts` (`is_owned`, `collection_id`, `visible` DESC, `is_pending` DESC, `created_height` DESC, `launcher_id` ASC)

indexes.name: nft_recent
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX `nft_recent` ON `nfts` (`is_owned`, `visible` DESC, `is_pending` DESC, `created_height` DESC, `launcher_id` ASC)

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (coin_id) REFERENCES nft_coins (coin_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `nfts` (
    `launcher_id` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `collection_id` BLOB,
    `minter_did` BLOB,
    `owner_did` BLOB,
    `visible` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `sensitive_content` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `name` TEXT,
    `is_owned` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `is_named` BOOLEAN GENERATED ALWAYS AS (`name` IS NOT NULL) STORED,
    `created_height` INTEGER,
    `is_pending` BOOLEAN GENERATED ALWAYS AS (`created_height` IS NULL) STORED,
    `metadata_hash` BLOB, `edition_number` INTEGER, `edition_total` INTEGER,
    FOREIGN KEY (`coin_id`) REFERENCES `nft_coins` (`coin_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: nft_coins

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (coin_id) REFERENCES coin_states (coin_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `nft_coins` (
    `coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `parent_parent_coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `parent_inner_puzzle_hash` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `parent_amount` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `launcher_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `metadata` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `metadata_updater_puzzle_hash` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `current_owner` BLOB,
    `royalty_puzzle_hash` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `royalty_ten_thousandths` INTEGER NOT NULL,
    `p2_puzzle_hash` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `data_hash` BLOB,
    `metadata_hash` BLOB,
    `license_hash` BLOB,
    FOREIGN KEY (`coin_id`) REFERENCES `coin_states` (`coin_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: nft_data
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `nft_data` (
    `hash` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `data` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `mime_type` TEXT NOT NULL
, `hash_matches` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 1)

tables.name: nft_uris
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `nft_uris` (
    `uri` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `hash` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `checked` BOOLEAN NOT NULL, `hash_matches` BOOLEAN,
    PRIMARY KEY (`uri`, `hash`)
)

tables.name: offers
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `offers` (
    `offer_id` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `encoded_offer` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `expiration_height` INTEGER,
    `expiration_timestamp` BLOB,
    `fee` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `status` INTEGER NOT NULL,
    `inserted_timestamp` BLOB NOT NULL
)

tables.name: offered_coins

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (offer_id) REFERENCES offers (offer_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `offered_coins` (
    `offer_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `coin_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (`offer_id`, `coin_id`),
    FOREIGN KEY (`offer_id`) REFERENCES `offers`(`offer_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: offer_xch

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (offer_id) REFERENCES offers (offer_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `offer_xch` (
    `offer_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `requested` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `amount` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `royalty` BLOB NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (`offer_id`, `requested`),
    FOREIGN KEY (`offer_id`) REFERENCES `offers`(`offer_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: offer_nfts

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (offer_id) REFERENCES offers (offer_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE "offer_nfts" (
    `offer_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `requested` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `launcher_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `royalty_puzzle_hash` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `royalty_ten_thousandths` INTEGER NOT NULL,
    `name` TEXT,
    `thumbnail` BLOB,
    `thumbnail_mime_type` TEXT,
    PRIMARY KEY (`offer_id`, `launcher_id`, `requested`),
    FOREIGN KEY (`offer_id`) REFERENCES `offers`(`offer_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: offer_cats

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (offer_id) REFERENCES offers (offer_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE "offer_cats" (
    `offer_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `requested` BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    `asset_id` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `amount` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `royalty` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `name` TEXT,
    `ticker` TEXT,
    `icon` TEXT,
    PRIMARY KEY (`offer_id`, `asset_id`, `requested`),
    FOREIGN KEY (`offer_id`) REFERENCES `offers`(`offer_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: rust_migrations
blockinfo
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `blockinfo` (
    `height` INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `unix_time` BIGINT NOT NULL
)

tables.name: nft_thumbnails
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `nft_thumbnails` (
    `hash` BLOB NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `icon` BLOB NOT NULL,
    `thumbnail` BLOB NOT NULL
)

FOREIGN KEY (coin_id) REFERENCES coin_states (coin_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (coin_id) REFERENCES did_coins (coin_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (coin_id) REFERENCES coin_states (coin_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (coin_id) REFERENCES nft_coins (coin_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (coin_id) REFERENCES coin_states (coin_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (offer_id) REFERENCES offers (offer_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

FOREIGN KEY (offer_id) REFERENCES offers (offer_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (offer_id) REFERENCES offers (offer_id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
